Ho: Judge Dale E. Ho, SDNY. Appointed 2023 (Biden). Yale Law. Former ACLU Voting Rights Project director, NAACP LDF attorney.
Engelmayer: Judge Paul A. Engelmayer, SDNY. Appointed 2011 (Obama). Harvard Law. Former WilmerHale partner, SDNY AUSA.
Rochon: Judge Jennifer L. Rochon, SDNY. Appointed 2022 (Biden). NYU Law. Former Girl Scouts of the USA general counsel, Kramer Levin partner.
Vargas: Judge Jeannette A. Vargas, SDNY. Appointed 2024 (Biden). Yale Law. Former longtime SDNY AUSA, deputy chief of Civil Division.
Woods: Judge Gregory H. Woods, SDNY. Appointed 2013 (Obama). Yale Law. Former Debevoise & Plimpton partner, DOJ trial attorney.
Carter: Judge Andrew L. Carter Jr., SDNY. Appointed 2011 (Obama). Harvard Law. Former federal public defender, EDNY magistrate judge.
Morrison: Judge Nina R. Morrison, EDNY. Appointed 2022 (Biden). NYU Law. Former Innocence Project senior litigation counsel.
Garnett: Judge Margaret M. Garnett, SDNY. Appointed 2024 (Biden). Columbia Law. Former SDNY AUSA, NYC Department of Investigation commissioner.
Torres: Judge Analisa Torres, SDNY. Appointed 2013 (Obama). Columbia Law. Former New York State Supreme Court justice.
Broderick: Judge Vernon S. Broderick, SDNY. Appointed 2013 (Obama). Harvard Law. Former SDNY AUSA, Weil Gotshal partner.
Koeltl: Judge John G. Koeltl, SDNY. Appointed 1994 (Clinton). Harvard Law. Former Debevoise & Plimpton partner, Watergate special prosecution force attorney.
Daniels: Judge George B. Daniels, SDNY. Appointed 2000 (Clinton). Berkeley Law. Former EDNY AUSA, New York State Supreme Court justice.
Stein: Judge Sidney H. Stein, SDNY. Appointed 1995 (Clinton). Yale Law. Former Stein Zauderer name partner, NY Court of Appeals clerk.
Cogan: Judge Brian M. Cogan, EDNY. Appointed 2006 (G.W. Bush). Cornell Law. Former Stroock & Stroock & Lavan partner and firm general counsel.
Donnelly: Judge Ann M. Donnelly, EDNY. Appointed 2015 (Obama). Ohio State Law. Former longtime Manhattan ADA, New York state court judge.
